Query1_ContactFrequency.description: Contact frequency analysis: Count contact frequency for each student

cypher.A:
MATCH (p:Person)-[r:CONTACTS]->(other:Person)
RETURN p.id AS person_id, COUNT(DISTINCT other.id) AS contact_count
ORDER BY contact_count DESC
LIMIT 20
cypher.B:
MATCH (s:Person_State)-[r:CONTACTS]->(other:Person_State)
WITH DISTINCT s.id AS person_id, other.id AS contacted_id
RETURN person_id, COUNT(DISTINCT contacted_id) AS contact_count
ORDER BY contact_count DESC
LIMIT 20
cypher.C:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'contacts'}]->(head:ProcessNode)
MATCH (head)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(pn:ProcessNode)-[:CONTACTS]->(other:Person)
RETURN p.id AS person_id, COUNT(DISTINCT other.id) AS contact_count
ORDER BY contact_count DESC
LIMIT 20

Query2_InfectionSpreadPath.description: Infection spread path: Find patient zero and trace its spread path (up to 3 levels)

cypher.A:
MATCH (p:Person)
UNWIND COALESCE(p['health_status_history'], []) AS chunk
WITH p, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(chunk) AS hist
WHERE hist.value = 'I'
WITH p, MIN(hist.start) AS infection_time
ORDER BY infection_time ASC
LIMIT 1
WITH p, infection_time
MATCH (p)-[r1:CONTACTS]->(p1:Person)
WHERE r1.start >= infection_time AND r1.start <= infection_time + 86400
WITH p, infection_time, p1, r1.start AS contact_time
UNWIND COALESCE(p1['health_status_history'], []) AS hist1
WITH p, infection_time, p1, contact_time, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(hist1) AS h1
WHERE h1.value = 'E' AND h1.start = contact_time
  AND NOT EXISTS {
    UNWIND COALESCE(p1['health_status_history'], []) AS hist_prev
    WITH apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(hist_prev) AS h_prev
    WHERE h_prev.value IN ['E', 'I'] AND h_prev.start < contact_time
  }
RETURN p.id AS patient_zero, p1.id AS level1_contact, h1.value AS status, h1.start AS status_time
ORDER BY contact_time
LIMIT 50
cypher.B:
MATCH (s:Person_State)
WHERE s.health_status = 'I'
WITH s ORDER BY s.start ASC LIMIT 1
WITH s.id AS patient_zero_id, s.start AS infection_time
MATCH (p0:Person_State {id: patient_zero_id})
WHERE p0.start <= infection_time + 86400 AND (p0.end IS NULL OR p0.end >= infection_time)
MATCH (p0)-[r1:CONTACTS]->(contacted_state:Person_State)
WHERE p0.start >= infection_time AND p0.start <= infection_time + 86400
  AND contacted_state.health_status = 'E'
  AND contacted_state.start >= p0.start
RETURN p0.id AS patient_zero, contacted_state.id AS level1_contact,
       contacted_state.health_status AS status, contacted_state.start AS status_time
ORDER BY p0.start
LIMIT 50
cypher.C:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'health_status'}]->(head:ProcessNode)
CALL (head) {
  WITH head
  MATCH (head)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node:ProcessNode)
  WHERE node.value = 'I'
  RETURN node ORDER BY node.start ASC LIMIT 1
}
WITH p, node
WHERE node IS NOT NULL
WITH p.id AS patient_zero_id, node.start AS infection_time
ORDER BY infection_time ASC LIMIT 1
WITH patient_zero_id, infection_time
MATCH (p0:Person {id: patient_zero_id})
MATCH (p0)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'contacts'}]->(head_c:ProcessNode)
MATCH (head_c)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(pn:ProcessNode)-[:CONTACTS]->(contacted:Person)
WHERE pn.start >= infection_time AND pn.start <= infection_time + 86400
WITH p0, contacted, pn.start AS contact_time
MATCH (contacted)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'health_status'}]->(head2:ProcessNode)
CALL (head2, contact_time) {
  WITH head2, contact_time
  MATCH (head2)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node:ProcessNode)
  WHERE node.value = 'E' AND node.start = contact_time
  RETURN node ORDER BY node.start ASC LIMIT 1
}
WITH p0, contacted, contact_time, node
WHERE node IS NOT NULL
RETURN p0.id AS patient_zero, contacted.id AS level1_contact,
       node.value AS status, node.start AS status_time
ORDER BY contact_time
LIMIT 50

Query3_HighRiskContact.description: High-risk contact identification: At a specified time point, find all high-risk contacts (infected person contacts susceptible person)

cypher.A:
MATCH (p1:Person)-[r:CONTACTS]->(p2:Person)
WHERE r.start <= $time AND (r.end IS NULL OR r.end >= $time)
WITH p1, p2, r
UNWIND COALESCE(p1['health_status_history'], []) AS hist1
WITH p1, p2, r, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(hist1) AS h1
WHERE h1.start <= $time AND (h1.end IS NULL OR h1.end >= $time)
  AND h1.value = 'I'
WITH p1, p2, r, h1
UNWIND COALESCE(p2['health_status_history'], []) AS hist2
WITH p1, p2, r, h1, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(hist2) AS h2
WHERE h2.start <= $time AND (h2.end IS NULL OR h2.end >= $time)
  AND h2.value = 'S'
RETURN p1.id AS infected_person, p2.id AS susceptible_person, r.start AS contact_time
ORDER BY r.start
LIMIT 100
cypher.B:
MATCH (s1:Person_State)-[r:CONTACTS]->(s2:Person_State)
WHERE s1.start <= $time AND (s1.end IS NULL OR s1.end >= $time)
  AND s2.start <= $time AND (s2.end IS NULL OR s2.end >= $time)
  AND s1.health_status = 'I'
  AND s2.health_status = 'S'
WITH DISTINCT s1.id AS infected_person, s2.id AS susceptible_person, s1.start AS contact_time
RETURN infected_person, susceptible_person, contact_time
ORDER BY contact_time
LIMIT 100
cypher.C:
MATCH (p1:Person)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'contacts'}]->(head_c:ProcessNode)
MATCH (head_c)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(pn:ProcessNode)-[:CONTACTS]->(p2:Person)
WHERE pn.start <= $time AND (pn.end IS NULL OR pn.end >= $time)
WITH p1, p2, pn, $time AS time_val
MATCH (p1)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'health_status'}]->(head1:ProcessNode)
CALL (head1, time_val) {
  WITH head1, time_val
  MATCH (head1)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node1:ProcessNode)
  WHERE node1.start <= time_val AND (node1.end IS NULL OR node1.end >= time_val)
  RETURN node1 ORDER BY node1.start DESC LIMIT 1
}
WITH p1, p2, pn, node1, time_val
WHERE node1 IS NOT NULL AND node1.value = 'I'
WITH p1, p2, pn, time_val
MATCH (p2)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:'health_status'}]->(head2:ProcessNode)
CALL (head2, time_val) {
  WITH head2, time_val
  MATCH (head2)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node2:ProcessNode)
  WHERE node2.start <= time_val AND (node2.end IS NULL OR node2.end >= time_val)
  RETURN node2 ORDER BY node2.start DESC LIMIT 1
}
WITH p1, p2, pn, node2
WHERE node2 IS NOT NULL AND node2.value = 'S'
RETURN p1.id AS infected_person, p2.id AS susceptible_person, pn.start AS contact_time
ORDER BY pn.start
LIMIT 100
